pairs.crewQuestion: How many close friends would you say you could call at 2 a.m.?

pairs.imposterQuestion: On a scale of 1–10, how often do you cancel plans last minute?

pairs.imposterQuestion: How many times a week do you order delivery (0–7)?

pairs.imposterQuestion: What percent (0–100) of your free time is spent alone?
